title: Chinese Kidney Bean Casserole
description: A hearty Chinese-inspired casserole featuring roasted kidney beans, savory sauce, and a crispy topping.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the roasted kidney beans and stir to coat with oil.
Add the tasty bean sauce, russian dark soy sauce, and casserole seasoning. Stir to combine.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes.
Transfer the bean mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a small bowl, whisk together the rice vinegar and 1 tsp of water.
Pour the vinegar mixture over the bean mixture and stir to combine.
Sprinkle the chopped green onion over the top.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
